fixture.prompt: 做一个按 F4 触发的三选一天赋抽取系统。玩家按 F4 后，从加权天赋池抽出 3 个候选天赋，显示卡牌选择 UI。玩家选择 1 个后，根据天赋稀有度给英雄增加属性，并且已选择的天赋后续不再出现。

connections.purpose: 效果状态驱动 UI 更新

patternHints.rationale: 需要模态 UI 界面
需要结果应用机制（多态模块，由 resolver/assembly 根据上下文解析具体 pattern）

executed.content:
local ____lualib = require("lualib_bundle")
local __TS__Class = ____lualib.__TS__Class
local __TS__ClassExtends = ____lualib.__TS__ClassExtends
local __TS__DecorateLegacy = ____lualib.__TS__DecorateLegacy
local ____exports = {}
local ____dota_ts_adapter = require("utils.dota_ts_adapter")
local BaseAbility = ____dota_ts_adapter.BaseAbility
local BaseModifier = ____dota_ts_adapter.BaseModifier
local registerAbility = ____dota_ts_adapter.registerAbility
local registerModifier = ____dota_ts_adapter.registerModifier

-- ============================================================
-- ABILITY: talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier
-- ============================================================
____exports.talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier = __TS__Class()
local talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier = ____exports.talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier
talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier.name = "talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier"
__TS__ClassExtends(talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier, BaseAbility)

function talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier.prototype.OnSpellStart(self)
    local caster = self:GetCaster()
    local duration = self:GetSpecialValueFor("buff_duration") or 6.0

    -- T20 Learning: use native AddNewModifier, NOT BaseModifier.apply()
    -- BaseModifier.apply() is a static method not copied to _G by registerModifier
    local modifier_applied = caster:AddNewModifier(caster, self, "modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier", {duration = duration})

    if modifier_applied then
        print("[talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier] ✅ modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier applied")
    else
        print("[talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier] ❌ modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier AddNewModifier returned nil")
    end

    self:PlayEffects()
end

function talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier.prototype.PlayEffects(self)
    local particle = "particles/units/heroes/hero_ogre_magi/ogre_magi_bloodlust_target.vpcf"
    local sound = "Hero_OgreMagi.Bloodlust.Target"
    local effect = ParticleManager:CreateParticle(particle, PATTACH_ABSORIGIN_FOLLOW, self:GetCaster())
    ParticleManager:ReleaseParticleIndex(effect)
    EmitSoundOn(sound, self:GetCaster())
end

talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier = __TS__DecorateLegacy({registerAbility(nil)}, talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier)
____exports.talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier = talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier
_G.talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier = talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier

-- ============================================================
-- MODIFIER: modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier (same file as ability — T19 pattern)
-- Archetype: buff
-- Engine only loads ScriptFile; separate modifier files are never loaded.
-- ============================================================
____exports.modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier = __TS__Class()
local modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier = ____exports.modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier
modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier.name = "modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier"
__TS__ClassExtends(modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier, BaseModifier)

function modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier.prototype:IsHidden()
    return false
end

function modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier.prototype:IsDebuff()
    return false
end

function modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier.prototype:IsPurgable()
    return true
end

function modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier.prototype:IsBuff()
    return true
end

function modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier.prototype:GetStatusEffectName()
    return "particles/status_fx/status_effect_frost.vpcf"
end

function modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier.prototype:StatusEffectPriority()
    return 10
end

function modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier.prototype:DeclareFunctions(self)
    return MODIFIER_PROPERTY_MOVESPEED_BONUS_CONSTANT
end



function modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier.prototype.GetModifierMoveSpeedBonus_Constant(self)
return self:GetAbility():GetSpecialValueFor('movespeed_bonus') or 80
end

function modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier.prototype:OnCreated(self)
    print("[modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier] OnCreated")
    
end

function modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier.prototype:OnDestroy(self)
    print("[modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier] OnDestroy")
end

-- T19 + T20: registerModifier(nil) + no .apply() — matches crystal_nova_x exactly
modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier = __TS__DecorateLegacy({registerModifier(nil)}, modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier)
____exports.modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier = modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier
_G.modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier = modifier_talent_draw_demo_effect_application_effect_modifier_applier

return ____exports

Blueprint has trigger/data/rule/ui/effect modules

details.name: Selected patterns include five key patterns
Assembly write targets include server paths
Assembly write targets include shared paths
Assembly write targets include UI paths
WritePlan target project matches host option

knownLimitations: Generator produces real content but may need refinement for production use
KV generation for talents produces basic structure - custom implementation may be needed
UI card interaction logic is generated but may need manual tuning
Pool state persistence is session-scoped only
